items.title: Trump's White House Ballroom Donors Include Google, Micron, Palantir and More
items.description: The $300 million cost of Trump's ballroom is being covered entirely by private donors, including several major corporations.

items.title: Meet all 37 White House ballroom donors funding the $300 million build, including Silicon Valley tech giants, crypto bros and the Lutnicks
items.description: The list, reviewed by Fortune, did not mention specific dollar amounts offered by each contributor.

items.title: Wall Street Week Ahead
items.description: Get the latest stock market updates, Q3 earnings highlights, and expert gold investment insights.
